new_terms.context: Power Distribution Board (PDB) feeds 12VDC to all the boards in the compute tray.
Intermediate Bus Converter; 50VDC is stepped down to 12VDC by the IBC module.
A feature enabling dynamic power sharing between the CPU and GPU based on workload demand.
Average Selling Price for power semiconductors in the BoM.
Nvidia's next-generation networking adapter mentioned alongside BlueField-4.
Hardware used to connect 50VDC power from the rack busbar to the compute tray.
